response.overview: Best friends Ella and Leah married the Harper brothers, firefighter Charles and doctor Noah. On their third anniversary, Charles’s first love locks Ella inside a burning room. When Ella begs Charles for help, he brushes her off to find his ex's cat. Leah rushes in to rescue Ella and calls Noah to save Ella and her baby, but is met with mockery. Heartbroken and betrayed after years of miserable marriages, the best friends decide to file for divorce from the Harper brothers together.
response.title: Brides in Smoke
